name: Sand Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Beat in the 2 eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated.
3. Gradually blend in the flour until the mixture forms a soft dough.
4. Chill the dough overnight to firm it up.
5. On a well-floured surface, roll out the dough as thinly as possible.
6. Using about 1/4 of the dough at a time, shape into diamond shapes and place on greased cookie sheets.
7. Brush each cookie with beaten egg white.
8. Sprinkle sugar and a pinch of cinnamon over the top of each cookie.
9. Place a pecan half in the center of each cookie.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are light brown.
11. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets for 1 minute before transferring them to wire racks.
12. Store in airtight tins.
